events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "staged",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective"],
  "percent_complete": 10,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Breaker/conductor ampacity mismatch",
    "Potential for conductor overheating and insulation damage",
    "Likely violation of NEC 240.4 and 240.6 for standard OCPD ratings",
    "Termination temperature rating may be exceeded per NEC 110.14(C)"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Lock-out/tag-out the circuit",
    "Verify conductor size, type, and temperature rating",
    "Verify equipment termination temperature ratings",
    "Select a breaker with correct ampacity per NEC 240.4 and 240.6",
    "Replace the mismatched breaker before energizing",
    "Verify coordination with upstream/downstream OCPDs"
  ],
  "rationale": "A breaker ampacity exceeding the conductor's allowable ampacity creates a fire and shock hazard. This is a clear NEC violation (Section 240.4) and must be corrected prior to energization. The selected replacement breaker should match the conductor's ampacity after applying ampacity correction/adjustment factors and verify termination temperature limitations per NEC 110.14(C). The staged materials include the wrong breaker, so the work must not proceed.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 240.4 (General Protection)",
    "NEC 240.6 (Standard Ampere Ratings)",
    "NEC 110.14(C) (Temperature Limitations)",
    "NEC 310.15 (Ampacity Tables)"
  ]
}
